title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PhonePe - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PhonePe - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
